mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ADM_USR ( CO_ID, USR_ID, USR_NM, USR_PWD, USR_EML, USR_PHN, USR_ADDR, USR_DESC, ROLE_ID, USE_FLG, LANG_VAL, SYS_MOD_VAL, DT_FMT_VAL, SYS_COLR_VAL, CRE_USR_ID, UPD_USR_ID, CRE_DT, UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{coId}, #{usrId}, #{usrNm}, #{usrPwd}, #{usrEml}, #{usrPhn}, #{usrAddr}, #{usrDesc}, #{roleId}, COALESCE(#{useFlg}, 'Y'), COALESCE(#{langVal}, 'en'), COALESCE(#{sysModVal}, 'light'), COALESCE(#{dtFmtVal}, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH:mm:ss'), COALESCE(#{sysColrVal}, '#1890ff'), #{creUsrId}, #{creUsrId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE ADM_USR SET USR_NM = #{usrNm}, USR_EML = #{usrEml}, USR_PHN = #{usrPhn}, USR_ADDR = #{usrAddr}, USR_DESC = #{usrDesc}, ROLE_ID = #{roleId}, USE_FLG = #{useFlg},
USR_FILE_ID =
NULL,
#{usrFileId},
UPD_USR_ID = #{updUsrId}, UPD_DT = NOW() WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND USR_ID = #{usrId}
UPDATE ADM_USR SET USR_PWD = #{usrPwd}, UPD_USR_ID = #{updUsrId}, UPD_DT = NOW() WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND USR_ID = #{usrId}
UPDATE ADM_USR SET USR_PWD = #{usrPwd}, UPD_USR_ID = #{updUsrId}, UPD_DT = NOW() WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND USR_ID = #{usrId}

UPDATE ADM_USR SET LANG_VAL = #{langVal}, SYS_MOD_VAL = #{sysModVal}, DT_FMT_VAL = #{dtFmtVal}, SYS_COLR_VAL = #{sysColrVal}, UPD_USR_ID = #{updUsrId}, UPD_DT = NOW() WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND USR_ID = #{usrId}
mapper.select: SELECT USR.CO_ID, USR.USR_ID, USR.USR_NM, USR.USR_PWD, USR.USR_EML, USR.USR_PHN, USR.ROLE_ID, USR.USR_ADDR, USR.USR_DESC, USR.USR_FILE_ID, USR.USE_FLG, USR.CRE_DT, USR.CRE_USR_ID, USR.UPD_DT, USR.UPD_USR_ID FROM ADM_USR USR WHERE USR.CO_ID = #{coId} AND USR.USR_ID = #{usrId} LIMIT 1
